extracted_claim: The customer claims the package's seal side was torn, suggesting it was opened.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Image 1 clearly shows the package exterior and the torn seal/tape on the side, meeting REQ_PACKAGE_EXTERIOR.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 clearly shows significant tearing and damage to the tape/seal on one side of the package, consistent with the claim of torn packaging on the seal side.
